title: shawia rudis
intro: Shawia rudis is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citron family. It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, valued for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant is rich in flavonoids and limonoids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Shawia rudis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections.
